retry_reason: refcount_inc never fails; if vllist is NULL, there is nothing to retry.
contract_summary: Acquires a reference on an afs_vlserver_list object by incrementing its refcount. Returns the same pointer if non-NULL, or NULL if input was NULL. The caller must later release this reference with a corresponding put (e.g., afs_put_vlserverlist) when the reference is no longer needed. This is a pure get wrapper without side effects.
